query:
SELECT 
  p.id,
  p.status,
  p.theme,
  p.facebookPublished,
  p.instagramPostId,
  LEFT(p.caption, 60) as caption_preview,
  p.publishedAt,
  a.handle,
  a.platform
FROM posts p
JOIN instagram_accounts a ON p.accountId = a.id
WHERE p.status = 'published'
ORDER BY p.publishedAt DESC
LIMIT 50;
command:

SELECT 
  p.id,
  p.status,
  p.theme,
  p.facebookPublished,
  p.instagramPostId,
  LEFT(p.caption, 60) as caption_preview,
  p.publishedAt,
  a.handle,
  a.platform
FROM posts p
JOIN instagram_accounts a ON p.accountId = a.id
WHERE p.status = 'published'
ORDER BY p.publishedAt DESC
LIMIT 50;
